name: monkeyscloud/monkeyslegion-template
description: MLView – the MonkeysLegion template engine with components, slots, and caching

suggest.psr/simple-cache: For PSR-16 compiled template caching via Redis/Memcached (^3.0)
suggest.monkeyscloud/monkeyslegion-di: Required for class-based component dependency injection (^2.0)
suggest.monkeyscloud/monkeyslegion-cli: Required for view:compile and lint CLI commands (^2.0)
suggest.monkeyscloud/monkeyslegion-cache: Full-featured template caching with tags, locks, and stats (^2.0)
